ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/documentation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/documentation
Language: html
The source for Datadog's documentation site.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sjj1024/PakePlus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sjj1024/PakePlus
Language: html
Turn any webpage/HTML/Vue/React and so on into desktop and mobile app under 5M with easy in few minutes. 轻松将任意网站/HTML/Vue/React等项目构建为轻量级(小于5M)多端桌面应用和手机应用仅需几分钟. https://ppofficial.netlify.app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ylianst/MeshCentral
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ylianst/MeshCentral
Language: html
A complete web-based remote monitoring and management web site. Once setup you can install agents and perform remote desktop session to devices on the local network or over the Internet.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madhuakula/kubernetes-goat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madhuakula/kubernetes-goat
Language: html
Kubernetes Goat is a "Vulnerable by Design" cluster environment to learn and practice Kubernetes security using an interactive hands-on playground 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/fluentui-system-icons
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fluentui-system-icons
Language: html
Fluent System Icons are a collection of familiar, friendly and modern icons from Microsoft.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ripienaar/free-for-dev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ripienaar/free-for-dev
Language: html
A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev
